# Competitive Signal Report — Enterprise AI Platform (Friday, 26 June 2026)

> **Bottom line:** Salesforce's aggressive "pay-per-resolution" pricing for Agentforce Help Agent signals a market shift towards outcome-based models, creating an opening for Kore.ai to highlight its predictable ABL-driven TCO and comprehensive platform validation against competitors still relying on opaque consumption or seat-based models.

## Three signals that matter

### Salesforce's Agentforce: Outcome-Based Pricing & Rapid Deployment
**What happened —** Salesforce launched Agentforce Help Agent, emphasizing rapid deployment in minutes and a "pay-per-resolution" pricing model. This offering aims to provide prebuilt service agents with an outcome-based pricing structure, potentially simplifying cost for customers by charging only for successful resolutions. [CMSWire](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxOekxSTGNDVGh4aDhBeGhIdzdHWGVNRjQxOHJXNlJGQ1p6cHFRSFc4LXh5RGZKSFNPNi0xVXljcHhLVUFzUnJJeVVRd2xsbEVxSUdnalJpc3JqTjM5SUlpX0dCdW9CMXNiMlRGRW1xMllkZ00teHBwN3liOWIzeTFhNTc3bFB2ejk0ajBmR2piVV9SdTFqaW83ag?oc=5) (2026-06-25)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This move validates the market's demand for outcome-based pricing, an area where Kore.ai can counter by emphasizing the predictable TCO of its ABL-driven platform, which ensures deterministic execution and clear cost attribution per agent/intent, unlike the potential ambiguity of "resolution" in a pay-per-outcome model.

### Five9 Highlights Human Oversight Amidst AI Adoption Surge
**What happened —** New research from Five9 indicates that 92% of consumers have adopted AI in their customer experience, yet trust remains heavily dependent on human support. Five9's strategy is also centering human oversight in its new voice AI strategy. [Business Wire](https://news.google.?oc=5) (2026-06-24)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This reinforces Kore.ai's strength in providing a balanced approach with ABL's deterministic capabilities for critical paths and seamless human agent handover, offering a more reliable and auditable solution than competitors whose AI-first approach might risk alienating customers who still value human interaction.

### Cresta Partners with New York Mets for Ticket Services Optimization
**What happened —** Cresta announced a partnership with the New York Mets to optimize ticket services using conversational AI, focusing on improving customer interactions and operational efficiency. [PR Newswire](https://news.google.?oc=5) (2026-06-25)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** While Cresta leverages its conversational AI for specific use cases like sports ticketing, Kore.ai's broader platform strength, including true omnichannel capabilities and deeper back-end integrations, offers a more comprehensive enterprise solution beyond specialized applications, positioning us as the strategic platform for end-to-end CX automation.

## Signal priority table

| Competitor | Move (dated) | Threat | Kore.ai counter |
|---|---|---|---|
| Agentforce (Salesforce) | (2026-06-25) Launched Agentforce Help Agent with pay-per-resolution pricing — [CMSWire](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxOekxSTGNDVGh4aDhBeGhIdzdHWGVNRjQxOHJXNlJGQ1p6cHFRSFc4LXh5RGZKSFNPNi0xVXljcHhLVUFzUnJJeVVRd2xsbEVxSUdnalJpc3JqTjM5SUlpX0dCdW9CMXNiMlRGRW1xMllkZ00teHBwN3liOWIzeTFhNTc3bFB2ejk0ajBmR2piVV9SdTFqaW83ag?oc=5) | High | Predictable TCO & deterministic cost attribution vs. "resolution" ambiguity |
| Five9 | (2026-06-24) New research on AI adoption vs. human trust dependence; voice AI strategy centers human oversight — Business Wire | Med | Balanced AI + human approach with ABL determinism vs. AI-first reliance |
| Cresta | (2026-06-25) Partnership with New York Mets for ticket services using conversational AI — [PR Newswire](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Low | True omnichannel & deep enterprise integration vs. specialized use cases |

## Watch for
(No supported items)

## Recommended actions
- Emphasize Kore.ai's ABL-driven predictable TCO and cost attribution model in sales conversations, contrasting it with the potential variability of "pay-per-resolution" or consumption-based AI pricing.
- Reinforce messaging around Kore.ai's true omnichannel capabilities and robust back-end integrations to differentiate from voice-first or specialized AI solutions.
- Arm sales with talking points that address customer concerns about AI trust and the need for human oversight, positioning Kore.ai's balanced approach as a key advantage.
